title: dennstaedtia axilaris
intro: Dennstaedtia axilaris, also known as the forked fern or forked polypody, is a species of fern in the family Dennstaedtiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Dennstaedtia axilaris include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a decoction, made by steeping the dried leaves in hot water, or as a tincture, extracted with a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
